message:
test(tldr): add component unit tests and e2e test suites for TL;DR page

Adds 1792 lines of test coverage across 8 new test files:

Unit tests (components/__tests__/):
- animated-number.test.tsx (94 lines): tests for the animated counter
  component — initial render, count-up animation, format options,
  reduced motion behavior
- bottom-sheet.test.tsx (147 lines): tests for the BottomSheet component —
  open/close transitions, drag-to-dismiss gesture handling, backdrop
  click, keyboard escape, snap point calculations, scroll locking
- copy-button.test.tsx (165 lines): tests for clipboard copy behavior —
  successful copy, clipboard API fallback, "copied" feedback state
  timing, error handling, aria-label updates
- tldr-section-nav.test.tsx (167 lines): tests for section navigation —
  active section tracking on scroll, smooth scroll on click, sticky
  positioning, responsive label switching (full vs short labels),
  keyboard accessibility

E2E tests (tests/e2e/):
- tldr-bottom-sheet.spec.ts (364 lines): Playwright e2e tests for mobile
  bottom sheet interaction — touch drag gestures, snap points, scroll
  within sheet, multi-step open/close sequences, backdrop interactions
- tldr-copy.spec.ts (196 lines): e2e tests for the install command copy
  button — clipboard write verification, visual feedback, keyboard
  trigger, multiple rapid clicks
- tldr-diagram.spec.ts (326 lines): e2e tests for the synergy diagram —
  node rendering, connection lines, hover highlights, responsive layout
  changes, animation states, accessibility attributes
- tldr-performance.spec.ts (333 lines): performance budget e2e tests —
  initial load metrics (LCP, CLS, TBT), animation frame rate during
  scroll, lazy loading of below-fold content, memory usage stability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
